title: Winter Storm Fern
description: Winter Storm Fern brought heavy snow and significant ice accumulations across the Southern Plains and Mid-South, causing widespread power outages and travel disruptions.
impacts: Heavy snow of 6-12 inches across Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas
Significant ice accumulations up to 0.5 inches
Dangerous travel conditions for several days
